pairs.notes: PENDING WET LAB CONFIRMATION. QuRIE-seq protocol may physically co-measure RNA and surface protein via antibody-oligo conjugates. Thiago Patente must confirm: (1) Are RNA and protein captured in same droplet? (2) Is the barcode column shared across modalities? (3) Protocol document reference?
PENDING WET LAB CONFIRMATION. Phospho-proteomics in QuRIE-seq: is this from same cell lysis as RNA? Most phospho protocols require separate sample preparation.
PENDING. ATAC modality not yet measured in QuRIE-seq. Will require 10x Multiome or equivalent. When available: confirm whether barcode links RNA and ATAC from same nucleus.
